title: Cobblemon: Black 2 & White 2 Wallpapers
description: Adds Black 2 & White 2's wallpapers to the cobblemon PC! Now for 1.7!
body:
Says it on the tin! Adds PC wallpapers from Black 2 & White 2 (And Black and White) to cobblemon!

# As of Cobblemon 1.7 This Resource Pack NO LONGER needs **[MoreCobblemonTweaks](https://modrinth.com/project/5KWlJ2HC)** , except for cobblemon versions below 1.7

# Requirements
Cobblemon (Obviously) :P

# Credits
All images used are from Nintendo/GameFreak/The Pokemon Company, and have been modified by myself for the purposes of this project. Also a huge thanks to the talented folks at spriter's resource.
